elections.note: Certified final 27,370 ballots cast (Total Voters) from CA SoS Statement of Vote, 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' section of the complete 2014 SOV PDF (Madera: 100 precincts, 85,976 eligible, 52,494 registered, 8,970 precinct + 18,400 VBM = 27,370; 52.14% of registered / 31.83% of eligible). Election-night first-report count not sourceable without Wayback (blocked here); pre-2016 county live-results snapshots are not preserved in accessible news.

Certified final 44,186 ballots cast (Total Voters) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' (Madera: 102 precincts, 87,254 eligible, 58,086 registered, 15,211 precinct + 28,975 VBM = 44,186; 76.07% of registered / 50.64% of eligible). First-report (election-night) count not sourceable here; Sierra News Online's 2016 results article only pointed readers to votemadera.com without a number, and the precise first tranche requires the blocked Wayback Machine.

First election under e-pollbooks (adopted 2018). Certified final 38,968 ballots cast (Total Voters) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' (Madera: 69 precincts, 89,818 eligible, 57,418 registered, total 38,968; 67.87% of registered / 43.39% of eligible). Election-night first-report count not sourceable without the blocked Wayback Machine; no news quoting the first tranche found.

Numerator 40,955 is a proxy: Sierra News Online quoting the Madera County Registrar's website first posting -- 'Madera County currently has 67,743 registered voters with 40,955 ballots cast in this election resulting in a 60.46% turnout,' as of Nov 4, 2020 with the next update scheduled Friday Nov 6 at 4pm (i.e. the election-night/morning-after first report, not the 8pm first tranche). Certified final 54,392 ballots cast (Total Voters) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' (Madera: 90,184 eligible, 67,909 registered, 6,392 precinct + 48,000 VBM = 54,392; 80.10% of registered / 60.31% of eligible). pct = 40,955 / 54,392 = 75.3%.

Certified final 37,345 ballots cast (Total Voters) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' (Madera: 59 precincts, 93,789 eligible, 72,865 registered, 3,333 precinct + 34,012 VBM = 37,345; 51.25% of registered / 39.82% of eligible). Election-night first-report count not sourceable here; first tranche lived only on the overwritten Clarity live-results page, which requires the blocked Wayback Machine.

Certified final 55,329 ballots cast (Total Voters) from CA SoS 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' (Madera: 78 precincts, 95,290 eligible, 78,204 registered, 8,560 precinct + 46,769 VBM = 55,329; 70.75% of registered / 58.06% of eligible). Election-night first-report count not sourceable here: no Madera-specific Nov 2024 first-count article found on Sierra News Online / local TV, and the registrar's first tranche (posted on votemadera.com / Clarity ENR) is overwritten and would need the blocked Wayback Machine. For reference, the March 2024 primary first report was 16,048 ballots at 10:25pm election night per Sierra News Online -- shows the registrar does post an election-night count, just not captured here for the general.
